# Chat App

AI chat application built with Bun, React, Hono, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kubernetes, and the AI SDK.

## Canonical Docs

- [README](./README.md): Setup, local development, Docker, Kubernetes, and common commands.
- [Security Policy](./SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting, release blockers, and incident response.
- [Security Hardening](./docs/security.md): Runtime, proxy, container, Kubernetes, and production controls.
- [Supply-Chain Policy](./docs/supply-chain.md): Bun install policy, dependency updates, Shai-Hulud response.
- [AI Architecture](./docs/ai-architecture.md): Agents, tools, streaming, observability, and safety boundaries.
- [Model Policy](./docs/model-policy.md): Model catalog, upgrade rules, and AI SDK channel policy.
- [Eval Checklist](./docs/evals.md): Required checks before AI behavior changes.

## Important Source Files

- `shared/models.ts`: Fallback model catalog and default model.
- `shared/tool-ids.ts`: Allowlisted tool IDs.
- `shared/schemas/ai.schema.ts`: AI chat, structured planning, and evaluation contracts.
- `server/src/lib/agents.ts`: Agent mode definitions and instructions.
- `server/src/lib/tools.ts`: Server-side tool implementations.
- `server/src/routes/ai/ai.handler.ts`: Streaming chat, planning, and evaluation handlers.
- `server/src/services/ai-structured.service.ts`: AI SDK structured output planning and LLM-as-judge service.
- `server/src/services/embedding.service.ts`: Document ingestion, chunking, embeddings, and RAG.
- `client/nginx.conf`: Production client and API proxy configuration.
- `compose.yml`: Local Docker and Traefik stack.
- `helm/chat-app/`: Kubernetes chart.

## Operational Commands

```bash
bun install --frozen-lockfile
bun run security:check
bun run check
bun run build
bun run k8s:validate
```
